set.summary: Pharmacologic butyrate treatment reduced microglial inflammatory cytokine expression in aged mice after LPS challenge, consistent with reduced neuroinflammation.
Sodium butyrate reduced prefrontal-cortex neuroinflammation in DSS ulcerative-colitis mice while also improving intestinal barrier integrity.
Sodium butyrate alleviated lead-induced neuroinflammation and improved cognition in a lead neurotoxicity context.
Clostridium butyricum treatment decreased microglial activation in APP/PS1 Alzheimer mice, consistent with reduced neuroinflammation through a butyrate-mediated gut-brain mechanism.
Sodium butyrate exacerbated neuroinflammation in an MPTP Parkinson mouse model, alongside worsening broader Parkinson-related pathology.
Sodium butyrate reduced neuroinflammation in 5XFAD mice and improved synaptic plasticity.
